---
title: Certification Request 
subtitle: Request with PKCS#10 and respond with X.509
description: ""
author: Shane Oh
date: 2025-02-04
categories:
  - Cryptography
  - Kubernetes
---

RFC 2986

Certification Request Syntax Specification (PKCS #10) defines the standard format for requesting digital certificates within Public Key Infrastructure (PKI) systems. Published in November 2000 by the Internet Engineering Task Force, it specifies how a certificate request is structured, encoded, and processed by a Certification Authority (CA).
